title: Supply Chain Manager - Agility India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Agility India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!
